instruction:
Review this Go code; json.Unmarshal returns an error and the struct stays empty. Explain and fix:

```go
func parse(data []byte) (User, error) {
	var u User
	err := json.Unmarshal(data, u)
	return u, err
}
```

instruction:
Review this Go code; it hides real bugs. Explain why a bare recover is dangerous and what to do instead:

```go
func process(data []byte) {
	defer func() { recover() }()
	risky(data)
}
```
